ksa_text: Knowledge of AI risk management frameworks and safety engineering principles, including risk identification across the AI lifecycle, risk categorization methodologies, and the design of mitigation measures that balance safety with system performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-025 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.3938 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.394, ddat=0.389, nist_ai_rmf=0.388) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3938 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-025 (composite 0.3938) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3938 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.3938 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3938, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
